blended.narrative: Snowshoe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 60°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 60°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
